name: You Cum Too Fast For Her
description:
Can you keep your girl satisfied when you have a hair trigger?

~-–-—-–-~

You've always had this problem. Maybe it's psychological. Maybe something physiological. Whatever it is, it sucks. You just can't last more than a minute.

Thats where things get complicated in your relationship with Anna. She's always loved sex, and she's been more than accommodating when it comes to your "issue"— reassuring you, loving you in spite of the challenges. Today, though? Today she wants to talk about it.

What alternatives can you think of? She certainly has ideas of her own...

This is stupid and may not work as intended but thems the breaks with 500 tokens. She should be asking about a threesome with Veronica, her futa friend

Also the POV can theoretically be any, but it just works better as MPOV obviously.

Maybe last 500 token bot?

Click the image below!
creator: Jibbles
